title: KIMIUP Chopping Board Set, 3 Chopping Boards with Non-Slip Feet, Juice Grooves, BPA Free, Easy Grip Handle, Dishwasher Safe Kitchen Accessories Cutting Board (Dark Grey)
features: 【Durable Kitchen Accessories】KIMIUP Cutting Board is made from non porous plastic that ultra durable. The chopping boards for kitchens contain no BPA, it is safety for your family to use this Kitchen Cutting Board.

【Three Sizes for Cutting Need】Plastic chopping board comes with three sizes: Large chopping board(39.6x23.8cm), Medium chopping board(31.4x19.8cm), small chopping board(24.3x14.5cm).The thickness of them are 0.9cm. Three sizes of chopping boards almost fit for all your cutting needs.

【Fashional Marble Pattern】KIMIUP Kitchen Cutting Board used fashion design with marble pattern.Compared with other conventional cutting board,our professional Chopping Boards are in the line with the current fashion trend. It makes your kitchen more beautiful.

【Juice Grooves & Non slip】KIMIUP plastic chopping board designs with juice grooves.To avoid the juice will run everywhere in the kitchen when cutting fruits or meat. At the same time, we designed non-slip mats on the four corners to ensure that the cutting board does not slide during use.

【Carrying Handle】KIMIUP kitchen set design with carrying handle. Compared with solid bamboo cutting boards and wooden cutting boards on the market, it is more convenient to store and take. Our cutting board kits can be washed by hand with water or thrown in the dishwasher for machine washing.
description: Product Description Three sizes of plastic cutting boards Use the large cutting board for meat（39.6x23.8cm） A medium cutting board for vegetable（31.4x19.8cm） A small cutting board for fruits（24.3x14.5cm） Each size can be used for multipurpose tasks. For every cutting needs, from slicing fruit to chopping vegetable. Ideal for cutting fruits, vegetables, bread and meat. Deep Drip Groove--to catch juices from fruits, vegetables, fish, and meats and prevent the juices from draining onto your countertop and keep the countertop clean and tidy. Nice Partner of Knives--It is not easy to be scratched by knife. Easy to Clean It is easy to clean by hand, and it is also easy to clean in dishwasher. Can Be Hang on the Wall The handle of plastic cutting board sets are easy to pick up and you can hang it on a hook or just flat it in a cupboard. Non-slip Surface non-slip surface of the cutting board design offers stability, reducing the board move on the kitchen counter, protect your hands from cutting hurts.
